headline: Piper Sandler Raises Kimberly-Clark (KMB) Price Target, Sees Long-Term Upside from Kenvue Deal
summary: Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ:KMB) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio: Top 10 Stocks to Buy According to Reddit. On June 17, Piper Sandler raised its price recommendation on Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ:KMB) to $121 from $115. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the stock. The firm said that potential benefits from Kimberly-Clark’s deal with Kenvue (KVUE) […]
